about: TechFix Solutions is a full-service computer repair and IT support shop located at 42 Main Street, Downtown. We repair laptops, desktops, and Macs; recover lost data; remove viruses; and build custom PCs. Walk-ins welcome. Open Monday–Friday 9:00 AM–7:00 PM, Saturday 10:00 AM–5:00 PM, closed Sundays and public holidays.
services: Hard drive / SSD upgrade & data migration - from $69 (plus drive cost)
Data recovery - from $120 (final quote after assessment)
policies: Free diagnostics on all devices; you'll get a repair quote before any paid work begins.
No fix, no fee - if we can't resolve the issue, you owe nothing beyond agreed parts.
All repairs carry a 90-day warranty covering the specific work performed and any parts we installed.
Refunds on unused parts or services within 7 days with the original receipt; labor already performed is non-refundable.
A 50% deposit is required for special-order parts and custom PC builds.
Devices not collected within 30 days of repair completion may incur a storage fee of $5/day.
We back up your data when possible, but customers are responsible for keeping their own backups; we are not liable for data loss.
Payment accepted by cash, card, and mobile payment; full payment is due on collection.

faqs.question: How long will my repair take?
faqs.answer: Most common repairs (virus removal, tune-ups, RAM/SSD upgrades) are done same-day or within 24 hours. Repairs needing ordered parts, like a screen or battery, typically take 2–4 business days. We'll give you an estimated turnaround time when you drop off your device.

faqs.question: Do I need an appointment, or can I just walk in?
faqs.answer: Walk-ins are always welcome during opening hours. If you'd like a guaranteed time slot or an on-site visit, feel free to call ahead and we'll schedule you in.

faqs.question: Will I lose my files during a repair?
faqs.answer: In most cases your files stay intact. For repairs that carry any risk to your data, we'll recommend a backup first and can do this for you. We still advise keeping your own backups, as we can't guarantee against data loss.

faqs.question: How much does it cost to find out what's wrong?
faqs.answer: Diagnostics are completely free. We assess the device, identify the issue, and give you a no-obligation quote before doing any paid work.

faqs.question: Do you repair Apple / Mac computers?
faqs.answer: Yes, we service both Windows PCs and Apple Macs, including MacBooks, iMacs, and Mac minis, for hardware and software issues.

faqs.question: My laptop got wet - can you fix it?
faqs.answer: Possibly. Turn it off immediately, don't try to charge it, and bring it in as soon as you can. Liquid damage repair starts at $99, and we'll assess whether it's repairable during the free diagnostic.

faqs.question: Do you offer a warranty on repairs?
faqs.answer: Yes. All our repairs come with a 90-day warranty covering the work performed and any parts we installed. If the same issue returns within that window, bring it back and we'll make it right.

faqs.question: Can you help set up my computer or network at home or the office?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We offer on-site setup and networking at $79/hour, covering new device setup, printer and Wi-Fi configuration, and small office networks. Remote support is also available at $35/hour.
